summary: Document bus_status window semantics and ensure tests prove default/disabled paths (QUEUE-008).

steps.title: Document window-hours usage
steps.notes: Update docs/agents.md (and parallel references) to explain default 24h window and how --window-hours 0 disables filtering.

steps.title: Tighten tests around window defaults
steps.notes: Extend test_agent_bus_status to assert default filtering hides old events and textual output mentions disabled mode.

checkpoint.description: Docs + tests capture bus_status window semantics
